name: Malware Reverse Engineering Handbook
shortDescription: NATO CCDCOE handbook covering static and dynamic malware analysis — tooling, sandboxing, unpacking, code analysis, reporting.
longDescription: Practical reverse-engineering handbook from the NATO Cooperative Cyber Defence Centre of Excellence. Covers lab setup, basic and advanced static analysis (PE structure, strings, imports, disassembly with IDA/Ghidra), basic and advanced dynamic analysis (sandboxing, debugging with x64dbg, monitoring with Procmon and Wireshark), unpacking, anti-analysis techniques, and writing the analyst report. A solid free starting point before moving on to Practical Malware Analysis or specialised commercial training.
